title: sarcochilus arachnites
intro: Sarcochilus arachnites, also known as the spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Australia and Southeast Asia. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Sarcochilus arachnites include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
